text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush King Halo to the infirmary after she gets
injured.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Even monkeys fall from trees, and even Homer
sometimes nods. Which means that my mistakes...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are just stepping stones to success! Let me try
again, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You worry too much. An injury like this will heal in
no time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just you watch how fast I heal up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo lets out another frustrated sigh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Really?! Fantastic! Then, without further ado...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I would like to amend my earlier statement at
this time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Instead of "my mistakes are stepping stones to
success,'' what I should have said is "my mistakes
are not mistakes at all.''

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you don't acknowledge a mistake, it doesn't
exist... Understood?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's expression remains unpleasant for
some time after that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's take some deep breaths. Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We just need to relax. Being too conscious of
previous mistakes only leads to more.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I won't make the same mistake again. Like I
said, my mistakes are stepping stones to success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's resolve to always move forward no
matter her mistakes has never been more
apparent.
